signals.headline: Lakers confirm 2-0 series lead over Rockets after 101-94 Game 2 win led by LeBron James' 28 points despite short-handed
signals.raw:
Lakers confirm 2-0 series lead over Rockets after 101-94 Game 2 win led by LeBron James' 28 points despite short-handed roster | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]

Lakers defeated Houston 101-94 in Game 2 on April 21, taking a 2-0 lead in their first-round Western Conference playoff series, with LeBron James scoring 28 points despite absences of Luka Doncic (hamstring, out for Game 2) and Austin Reaves
